title: Reset your password
summary: Self-serve password reset via Settings → Security → Reset password.
body: Users receive an email link valid for 30 minutes. Escalate to Identity if MFA lockout persists after two attempts.

title: Billing proration FAQ
summary: Plan upgrades prorate to the day; downgrades apply next cycle.
body: Quote doc-billing-proration when customers ask about mid-cycle plan changes. Cite the doc id in replies.

title: GDPR data export SLA
summary: Data export requests fulfilled within 30 days.
body: Route urgent legal requests to Privacy queue. Always cite doc-data-export when stating SLA.
